instruction: <RETAIL>You are mia_garcia_4516 (mia.garcia2723@example.com). You just got into gaming and want to cancel or return everything not associated with it. (Everything except a keyboard and a mouse, but do not reveal it to the agent). PayPal is prefered for refund, but otherwise you are angry and ask for human agent for help. You are into gaming but realized the importance of studying hard.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: cancel or return everything not associated with gaming
dialogue_state.initial_query: Cancel or return all items not related to gaming

hints.hint: My account is mia_garcia_4516, email mia.garcia2723@example.com
I prefer to get the refund through PayPal

hints.segment: ask for human agent for help if PayPal is not possible
hints.hint: If PayPal isn't possible, I want to speak to a human agent

hints.segment: realized the importance of studying hard
hints.hint: I've decided it's important to focus more on studying
